wiki-fact-actions: seeded three unverified Vandelay Network facts, then confirmed fact #41, corrected fact #42 into confirmed replacement #44, and retired fact #43 through the live UI; final UI and DB state matched

notes: No open tester-assigned bead was present at run start; this was an autonomous focused QA run.

Design pass: axe reported the known global color-contrast issue and the desktop screenshot reproduced the already-filed sidebar resize overlap (psa-vzk1). No duplicate design findings were filed.
The requested impeccable design-critique skill/tool was not available in this session, so screenshots and axe output were reviewed directly.
